name: Rust Jaccard Similarity Analyzer
description: Binary Ninja plugin for performing Jaccard similarity analysis against binaries in a folder and exporting results to Parquet format
longdescription: This plugin extracts features from binary files (instructions, functions, basic blocks) and calculates Jaccard similarity coefficients against a folder of binaries. Results are exported to Parquet format for further analysis. The plugin supports parallel processing for efficient analysis of large binary datasets.
